notes: Greenfield Bun+TypeScript project; no package.json existed at detect time.
bun:sqlite is a Bun built-in — not listed as a dependency.
Resend is used via raw fetch to REST API, no SDK dependency.
test_framework set to bun:test (Bun built-in); no vitest.
Lint/typecheck both use tsc --noEmit to keep verification lean (no eslint in v1).
